scripts.test: node --require ./node_modules/ts-node/register/transpile-only --test tests/lexer.test.ts tests/parser.test.ts tests/typechecker.test.ts tests/codegen.test.ts tests/config.test.ts tests/integration.test.ts tests/build-pipeline.test.ts tests/verilog-lint.test.ts tests/golden-output.test.ts tests/class-compiler.test.ts
scripts.test:all: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run test:production
